title: Virgulaster bernardinus
taxonomy: Virgulaster bernardinus belongs to the family Cynipidae, which is a group of gall wasps. It is classified as a type of gall-forming insect, specifically a cynipid wasp. This classification is based on its unique life cycle, where it induces the formation of galls on its host plant. The genus Virgulaster is part of the subfamily Lartinae, which includes various gall-inducing wasps. Further classification within the subfamily would involve its specific species and its relationship to other wasps within the Lartinae subfamily.
